steps.title: Connect realism to comfort
steps.content: The text says handshakes can create trust and that the team wants to improve human-robot interactions. A realistic robot handshake would support that goal if it makes people feel more comfortable or trusting when interacting with the robot.

steps.title: Reject unsupported ideas
steps.content: Choice B compares programming handshakes with other greetings, which the text never discusses. Choice C shifts from handshake feel to robot appearance. Choice D introduces possible nonhuman uses for the robot, outside the stated purpose of improving human-robot interaction. The answer is A.
